title: Sour Fluffy Korean Flour Jjigae
description: A comforting, keto-friendly Korean dish made with self-raising flour, kombu-cold-extract, and a hint of sourness.

ingredients.name: kombu-cold-extract
ingredients.notes: or 1 package of instant kombu extract

instructions: Mix self-raising flour, kombu-cold-extract, gochujang, fish sauce, and sugar in a bowl.
Add chopped green onion and mix well.
Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and add water, mixing until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and brush with sesame oil.
Add 2-3 balls of dough to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve hot with an egg on top, if desired.
